---
title: "GeneFam-Pipeline Report"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
---

# Run Configuration

This report summarizes one GeneFam-Pipeline run.

The report input index is `report/report_index.tsv`. It records which tables and sequence outputs are available for this run, so disabled or not-yet-run modules stay explicit.

# Species Included

The selected species are listed in `metadata/species_manifest.tsv`.

# Gene Family Identification

The MVP identifies candidate family members with HMMER and optional DIAMOND/BLAST evidence, then writes stable TSV and FASTA outputs for downstream analysis.

# Family Member Counts

The main summary table is `tables/family_counts.tsv`.

# Duplication-Aware Analysis

Named WGD events such as gamma, beta, alpha, and theta are reported only when evidence-backed configuration is provided. Otherwise, the report uses neutral labels such as `WGD_layer_1`.

# Limitations

Disabled modules are reported explicitly so downstream interpretation stays tied to observed outputs.
